title: WHY I LEFT HAMPTON UNIVERSITY
body:
I appreciate this young woman's courage. In expressing HER reasons not to return to a given university. As a mother of a freshman who happens to attend a HBCU. I'd rather have current students perspectives on Every Little Thing. Before sending my only daughter across country for college.
Not every HBCU have a good working system. I feel truly blessed to say that my daughters school is very in tune with the needs of its students. I'd be dying to know that my daughter has a medical issue and was told to make an appointment to return in three or four days. That is in no way acceptable. Particularly, to a person who was raised in the South.
Hampton is a pillar of education. But, there are institutions that ARE addressing the issues this young woman addressed. Why accept less for more money?
Good luck at The University of Houston! Houston is a great place for careers in nursing.
author: @vestriabarlow5293

title: WHY I LEFT HAMPTON UNIVERSITY
body: Damn why does it cost $40,000 if you literally have to pay for EVERYTHING..like what exactly does the tuition cover ?
author: @Ddajaa

title: WHY I LEFT HAMPTON UNIVERSITY
body: THANK YOU FOR THIS! You just confirmed everything my daughter felt on Admitted Students Day. She's at peace with her decision to attend University of Memphis.
author: @dogpaws88

title: WHY I LEFT HAMPTON UNIVERSITY
body: This video is full of big ole facts. I went to Hampton for grad school. Shit was terrible. I was so disappointed in my people. I’m glad the students finally rebelled this year.
author: @RDJenki1

title: WHY I LEFT HAMPTON UNIVERSITY
body: All the people in the comments can really go somewhere honestly... IF YOU LIKE HAMPTON GREAT BUT ITS NOT THE SCHOOL FOR EVERYONE!!! I felt it was too expensive for what your getting out of it... yes I love HBCUs and still support them but Hampton wasn't for me and I saw too many problems and negatives while I could get way more FOR LESS somewhere else even though I was on an academic scholarship, stayed in the new honors dorm and with a 3.7 GPA the school still wasn't for me and so I transferred . The school I'm at right now is a way better fit FOR ME. If you graduated from Hampton Howard Yale University of Houston it doesn't matter as long as you see the benefit of where u want to attend and if YOU will have a better experience.
author: @bbasham48

title: WHY I LEFT HAMPTON UNIVERSITY
body: She's literally just stating reasons WHY she left Hampton because both friends and family kept asking her. Why is everyone taking this personally?

title: WHY I LEFT HAMPTON UNIVERSITY
body: Kathryn, I watched this video as a former HU transfer student as well, and I'm shocked to hear that so many things haven't changed.  I transferred after my first semester back in 2001. Luckily I was I as in Kenady, so I didn't have the dorm issues, BUT I will say that coming from Houston, Hampton is the first time I ever added salt to my food.  Honestly, until I got there, I didn't even really know what table salt was for because I never had to use it!

title: WHY I LEFT HAMPTON UNIVERSITY

title: WHY I LEFT HAMPTON UNIVERSITY

There are a lot of people who do not leave out of tradition or because of their friends.  Yes the university of Houston

title: WHY I LEFT HAMPTON UNIVERSITY
body: My daughter is slated to go to an HBCU next year, which we are excited about. And I am hoping that her experience will be great. I was a little put off with your reasonings initially, but when you touched on the medical reasoning, I was with your decision 100 percent. Also, the customer service issue is real. And you’re right, you have to feel comfortable. I would be highly upset if my daughter was turned away from medical treatment of something serious, and for ice 🤦🏾‍♀️ Hope that your new school will provide you with all that you need and some of your wants 😊

title: WHY I LEFT HAMPTON UNIVERSITY
body: I refuse to take out loans so I don’t mind going somewhere else. My mom wants me to go since she did but I’d have to pay tuition myself and when she attended Hampton, it was only $18,000 a year, now it’s twice that
author: @camiller958

title: WHY I LEFT HAMPTON UNIVERSITY
body: I’m going to respect all the opinions of the alums who commented and felt some type of way about my video. Like any alum from any school, they are going to want to back up their alma mater. As anyone should lol. And to be honest, I like a challenge. However, I felt I executed the purpose of my video in the best way possible and answered all the questions I had been asked by weighing out the pros AND the cons. “The education is worth it,” “Being a Hampton graduate is the best thing you can be.” Probably so, but why be unhappy with the other aspects throughout your journey. Clearly what I stated are common issues that plenty of Hampton students consistently complain about; therefore, why stay at a school where you are constantly complaining? That ultimately takes over your happiness. So love the school all you want (I know I did), but I truly believe that there needs to be a change. If you’re able to make it through those 4-5 years without a problem, that’s AWESOME! But don’t discredit someone’s reasons for wanting to leave and wanting to use their money elsewhere.
author: @kathryngrant3752

title: WHY I LEFT HAMPTON UNIVERSITY
body: I was onyx 11 also and I left Hampton because I wasn’t doing well and I didn’t feel like I was apart of anything. I was unimpressed by school and the people there were not friendly. I wasn’t getting the level of education I wanted so I went home to Jersey and am now at a pdwi where I am doing so much better. Hampton isn’t all it’s chalked up to be. I left after my 1st semester.

Thank you in advance, Dr. Haggins

title: Hampton University Campus Tour
body: I'm proud to say I went to one of the best and most beautiful HBCU campuses in the nation. They are building and renovating so many things now, it just continues to look better and better every time I visit. We took care of our campus and never walked on the grass. The scenery and the people were beauitful there at Hampton so I fit right in ;) So many memories looking at this video. I'm back in Texas now but this will forever be my "Home by the Sea". Proud Hamptonian 1997-2002
author: @Blakmajik78

title: Hampton University Campus Tour
body: I'm from Louisiana. I am considering applying to Hampton University for Graduate School. I also attended an HBCU. I'm a student at Southern University A&M College. There is nothing like an HBCU experience. How is life in Hampton, Virginia?

title: HAMPTON UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR!! | allthingsimani
body:
Hampton and all the HBCUs MUST remain a permanent fixture within the pantheon of universities and colleges in the US.  It was they who gave us our middle class.  And an argument might be made that the HBCUs provide the nurture for growth and development among talented and upwardly mobile young African Americans. 

Before ending my "filibuster," I'd like to ask this question.  Is the movie starlet with the highly improbable name Acquanetta" the same person as Mildred Davenport, who was graduated from Hampton sometime in the 40s?  Anyone?  If so, might it become a project for a Hampton student focusing on a career in journalism to write a biography of this actress and her entire family?  Anyone?  (Keep up the good work, Hampton!)
author: @ccaammiinniiito2

title: HAMPTON UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR!! | allthingsimani
body:
(Cont'd)  If a bio of the late actress were to be undertaken by a bright, enterprising young student, hopefully a woman who would avoid a "taboid" bio of this enigmatic figure.  And believe me, Acquanetta was enigmatic, with a Wiki bio that just didn't hang together.  Someone do the actress up proud by writing a balanced bio, okay?

I might add that the bios of two African American tragediennes, concert pianist Philippa Schuyler and movie star Dorothy Dandridge were exceedingly well done.  And sing praises to Ebony magazine for not "tabloiding" the tragic life of Philippa, a fall from her station that was both dramatic and heartbreaking.
author: @ccaammiinniiito2

title: HAMPTON UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR!! | allthingsimani
